upcoming.title: Women in E-Mobility Networking Session - A side event of the KPLC E-Mobility Conference 2026
upcoming.description: Edna will be sharing her journey from engineering Kenya's roads at Kenya Urban Roads Authority, to sustainable transport at UN-Habitat (United Nations Human Settlements Programme), to running a think tank focused on climate and socioeconomic transformation through transport

upcoming.title: Building sustainable road safety systems for Africa: from data to implementation and ownership
upcoming.description: Dr. Anteneh is attending the AfroSAFE Annual Conference in Lusaka, Zambia, and teaching in the traffic safety course on the topic of Safe Infrastructure.

upcoming.title: Africa E-Mobility Week
upcoming.description: Co-convened by the Africa E-Mobility Alliance (AfEMA) and the UN Environment Programme (UNEP), the event serves as a high-level continental platform bridging the gap between policy, finance, and practical implementation. Transport Futures will join the conversation.

upcoming.title: Infrastructure, Equity, and the African City
upcoming.description: Dr. Anteneh will be speaking on planning for informality — why Africa's cities need new frameworks, not borrowed ones.

upcoming.title: Nordic-Africa EV Summit
upcoming.description: The Nordic-Africa EV Summit is a working platform connecting Africa’s electric mobility transition with Nordic leadership in transport, energy systems, and battery energy storage. Through twin-city convenings in the Nordics and Africa, the Summit brings together governments, utilities, fleet operators, financiers, and technology providers to move electric mobility from pilots to scalable deployment. With a focus on trade corridors, public transport, fleet electrification, and storage-backed charging infrastructure, the Summit aligns policy, investment, and real-world implementation to enable reliable, low-carbon transport systems even where grids are constrained.

past.title: Roundtable: EV Charging Infrastructure for African Cities
